name: Loop of Destruction
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>廻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card's name becomes "Ring of Destruction" while on the field. Once per turn, if a monster(s) on the field is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 monster on the field; destroy it, and if you do, each player takes 500 damage.
eff: This card's name becomes "Ring of Destruction" while on the field. Once per turn, if a monster(s) on the field is destroyed by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 monster on the field; destroy it, and if you do, each player takes 500 damage.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
